name: the full-surface reveal is persisted in the produced profile so downstream stages can read the menu
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answers p.json --partial --out prof.json --now 2026-07-08T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("prof.json")); fs=p["full_surface"]; exit(fs.is_a?(Array) && fs.length>=40 && fs.all?{|e|e.key?("activated")} ? 0:1)' && echo reveal-persisted 1>&2
